text: Touch support for list (column) editing on mobile
description:
The columns view editing is currently keyboard-only (vim-style); mobile users
with no physical keyboard cannot create/edit/reorder phases or aims. Add
click/touch affordances that mirror the key actions in
packages/frontend/src/stores/ui/keyboard-actions.ts.

Concrete starting point: tapping an empty phase placeholder/slot in a column
should create a phase (the o/O action).

Phase (column) actions to expose as taps/buttons: create before/after (o/O),
edit (e), delete-with-confirm (d d), mark as current (c), reorder up/down (J/K),
enter aim navigation (i). Column left/right nav (h/l) already has swipe.

Aim navigation actions: create (o/O), edit (e), delete (d d), move out/in the
hierarchy (H/L), reorder up/down (J/K), cut/copy/paste teleport (x/c/p),
show parent paths (s), expand/collapse / step into incoming (h/l).

Graph view: tap to select an aim/link, plus delete (d) and edit (e) affordances.

Global: aim search (/) and view toggle (g) should have visible buttons too.

status.comment: Verified 2026-06-27. Touch swipe NAVIGATION between columns is implemented: ColumnsView.vue onTouchStart/Move/End with a 50px swipe threshold, multi-touch aborts so vertical scroll isn't hijacked (commit 5370a43). Remaining: touch-based aim EDITING within columns (e.g. drag-to-reparent on touch) is not evident — confirm whether that's still wanted.
